title: Junior Business Development Manager at Ramky Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Ramky Group
jsonLd.description:
Ramky Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ramky Group:
Ramky Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ramky Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
